_status_line: Consolidated 1 reel idea · 0 top images · urgency HIGH · 1 blocker identified

hero_action.one_thing: Provide missing image_ideas artifact for Reel 2026-05-18-REEL-518-05.
hero_action.why_now: Without image ideas we cannot finalize top_3_images or complete visual assets for the waitlist reel.

top_3_reels.hook: Your Royal Pop wasn’t made for this.
shot_list_preview: Wrist shot: Royal Pop in Cradle Adapter V1, awkward angle, crown digging into wrist
Close-up: 40.35mm inner socket aligning with Royal Pop case
Macro: 0.7mm retaining lip snapping into place
Wrist shot: Royal Pop now flush on wrist, no gap
Macro: FKM rubber texture, fingers pressing
top_3_reels.why_this_will_work: Aligns with the top trend cluster “Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race” (audience_fit 9) and uses the proven spec‑driven hook style that drives high IG engagement.

whats_trending_now.cluster_name: Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race

why_these_will_work: The reel idea leverages the strongest audience‑fit trend (conversion race) and the high‑urgency hype around the upcoming Swatch × AP launch, delivering a spec‑focused hook that matches the brand’s engineering‑led tone. Coupled with the precise visual brief, it promises the rapid conversion needed for waitlist sign‑ups.

campaign_status.current_focus: Finalize visual assets for spec‑driven waitlist reel

today_priority: Obtain image_ideas artifact, then generate top_3_images and feed Visual Brief to production.

approved_deliverables.angle: 40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber. No drilling.
approved_deliverables.next_step: Await image ideas to complete asset creation.

blocked_items.reason: Missing image_ideas artifact prevents top image selection and final asset pack.
blocked_items.required_fix: Supply image_ideas JSON with at least 5 ideas, each containing viral_score and render_prompt.

next_3_actions: Request image_ideas artifact from upstream team.
Once received, run Image Director to rank ideas and fill top_3_images.
Update Visual Brief with any new shots and hand off to production (estimated 50 min).
do_not_do: Publish the reel before confirming image assets.
Assume colourway list includes the missing five colours; only use website‑listed colours.
success_condition: Image ideas received, top_3_images selected, and final reel exported with approved copy and visual brief, ready for scheduled posting within 2 hours.
